title: Trading has never been THIS EASY
author: StevenVinyl
selftext: Just tell your agent to get that dough and BOOM.

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Cod3x

comments.author: BuildwithPublic
comments.body: What did you use to create this?

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Used Cod3x

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body:
Core: Execute longs on structure breaks (SMA50, SMA200, MA crossovers)

Agent has 3 tasks:   
\- SMA200 Break 4H  
\- SMA50 Break 1H

\- SMA20/50 Cross 1H

with more conditions though, LLM checks a lot more, these are just triggers for the tasks.

replies.author: Levi-Lightning
replies.body: Couldn't you just hardcode this in python for the same result then?

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: no, I don't want a deterministic algo bot which I need to tweak 10 times a week.

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: around 0.10-0.20c per run with Qwen 3.5 Plus

comments.author: Patient_Kangaroo4864
comments.body: If it were that easy, everyone would be retired; markets don’t care about your agent’s vibes.

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: my agent vibes care about the market though

replies.author: Outrageous-Law-4700
replies.body:
if it can be that basically automated then it would’ve already been done 

nobody sells a real edge, or at least for that cheap 🤷‍♂️

replies.author: ilikerolls
replies.body: You out don’t understand the vibes he be putting out 🕺🤣

replies.author: Berdielove
replies.body: So write

comments.author: Forsaken_Leader_8
comments.body: It's really nice, I use signal whisper in the last 3 month and it gave me good results, it paid for itself

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: banger

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: the dough has to be made

comments.author: R3VO360
comments.body: Amazing! Does this cod3x come with a subscription or is it open source?

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Credit based, so pre-pay to use credits yeah.

replies.author: R3VO360
replies.body: Thank you, is it helping making some money at least to keep up with the subscription or do you think is bullshit?

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Definitely with enough trading capital pays for itself + on top

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Its not a "deposit 300$ and print money" though lol.

replies.author: R3VO360
replies.body: Yeah yeah I understand, was just wondering whether it was a serious tool or more of a toy to play with and have fun. Thanks a lot for sharing your experience sir!

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Anytime

comments.author: bjxxjj
comments.body: lol if it was really that easy we’d all be retired already. bots help but you still gotta know what you’re feeding them or they’ll speedrun your account into oblivion.

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: you gotta have the right ingredients

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Indeed

comments.author: Soft-Musician-402
comments.body:
What amount to trade and receive 
I can’t see the examples clearly please

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: I removed the actual numbers for privacy

comments.author: Flashy-Rub8033
comments.body: Where do you pull out the market data? I was using API call for market data but it turns out rly expensive :(

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: Hyperliquid, coingecko, Allora, etc...

comments.author: Odd-Shopping7497
comments.body: You said it doesn’t print money which makes sense lol, but how much of the work is on me? I’m still somewhat new too trading and wanting to know what stuff I should learn or need to know in order to utilize it, or if you j needa know the basics to make money with it.

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: if you have a basic understanding of LLMs, aka how to work or just prompt with them, then it should be pretty easy. The app can basically teach you how to trade with the chat option as well. Each run is followed with a full explanation of what happened, why and how, so you can learn by using it as well.

replies.author: StevenVinyl
replies.body: this is Cod3x: [https://x.com/Cod3xOrg](https://x.com/Cod3xOrg)
